tenant.name: Demo: Append System Prompt
tenant.description: Demonstrates appendSystemPrompt — same skill with three different system prompt overrides (concise, detailed, JSON).

concise.appendSystemPrompt: Keep all responses under 50 words. Be extremely brief and to the point.

detailed.description: Detailed mode — thorough answers with examples
detailed.appendSystemPrompt: Provide detailed, thorough answers. Include examples and explanations. Be comprehensive.

json.description: JSON mode — answers in JSON format
json.appendSystemPrompt: Always respond in valid JSON format. Structure your answer as a JSON object with relevant keys.
